Drop videos here or import any video folder. Metadata stays in this app. Non-video and system files are ignored.

Agent Queue Idle. Uses the provider and model set in AI Studio.

No agent run yet.

AI Studio

Connect local or remote agents to classify videos, generate tags, and reconstruct prompts from frames and metadata.

Provider

The webhook receives JSON with task, video metadata, tags, and one JPEG frame when available. It should return JSON fields such as title, type, tags, prompt, notes, status, and rating.

Workflow

Idle.
No AI workflow has run yet.

Ollama runs locally. Gemini calls Google with the selected frame and metadata. Prompt bundles and webhooks are for Codex or any other agent you wire up.
